Home / Service Areas / Bixby

General contractor in Bixby, OK

Trusted local professionals serving Bixby and surrounding communities

Serving Bixby, OK

Renovation & Construction Services, LLC is a leading general contractor serving Bixby, Oklahoma. We provide a wide range of construction and remodeling services to homeowners and businesses throughout the area. Our team is committed to delivering exceptional quality, outstanding customer service, and lasting value on every project. From custom home building to kitchen and bathroom renovations, we have the expertise and experience to handle any project, large or small. We understand the unique character of Bixby and strive to create spaces that reflect the community's style and charm. We prioritize clear communication and transparency throughout the entire construction process. We are proud to be a part of the Bixby community. Contact us today to discuss your construction or remodeling needs and learn how we can help you achieve your vision.

Bixby is a vibrant and growing city known for its excellent schools, beautiful parks, and strong community spirit.
